case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS KAHN RICHARD

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAHN RICHARD $1,019.05 PRINCIPAL, $16.29 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,035.34, CC 1719 DAMAGES INCLUDED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO RICHARD KAHN RETURNED ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,019.05 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT KAHN RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KAHN RICHARD
